3098250.name: Viral Multiplayer
3098250.description:
VIRAL MULTIPLAYER

A Survival Third Person Shooter in which the survival players have to survive in order to win. The Viral players have to infect the survivors to win.

Features:

Multiplayer and Single Player
The survivors spawn with a gun and the ability to drop a bomb.
After the match countdown one of the survivors becomes viral and has to try to infect all of the survivors which will then also become infected and will hunt survivors.
This game drops you right into action!
Several Fun and Challenging Maps and Biomes
3rd person shooter mechanics/gameplay
Viral vs Survivors (Survive against the viral players for as long as possible)
Countdown, Spawning, Gameplay, Winner announcement, Repeat
Main menu
Multiplayer session setup (Steam Online SubSystem) Host, find & join games
Shooter mechanics
Reloading mechanic
Explosive dynamite bomb
Respawn system
Ragdolling
Well Optimized

and much more…
